ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been shipped and is on its way.

Order Details:
• Order #1234567890
• Item: Bose Noise Cancelling Headphones
• Quantity: 1
• Price: ₹12,999

Estimated delivery: 3-5 business days.

Track your order here: <URL>

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Congratulations! You have been selected for prestigious XYZ University Scholarship
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

Shubhkamnayein! Aapko XYZ University Scholarship ke liye chunaa gaya hai. Final verification ke liye humein aapka administrative fee ₹5,000 chahiye.

Kripya payment link <URL> par jayein aur payment receipt ke saath is email ka reply karein 48 ghante ke andar. Nahi karne par scholarship cancel ho sakta hai.

Yeh email official hai from XYZ University. Kripya isko kisi ke saath share na karein.

Regards,
Scholarship Committee
XYZ University
